meta.method: Headless MAP (agent-browser + injected engine) read ScrollTrigger.getAll() / gsap.globalTimeline / CSS; real-browser CAPTURE (claude-mcp Chrome) for hover + onEnter reveals.
meta.notes: Webflow present but IX2 unused (data-w-id 0, ix2 module null) — all motion is GSAP/ScrollTrigger + CSS. Scrub-parallaxes and CSS effects were spec'd fully from the registry/CSS with no capture. onEnter-callback reveals are not in any registry and needed live capture; several capture quirks below (see _assessment).

patterns.appliesTo: hero image, work header, section wraps (4 ScrollTriggers)
patterns.summary: scrub-linked transform (y / yPercent), ease none. Each section drifts as the next scrolls in; stacking depth effect.

patterns.appliesTo: .u-sprite (x7: hero deco, work stop, testimonial backquote, contact, footer, transition smiley/nge)
patterns.summary: CSS sprite-sheet: 4-frame stepped background animation, 0.5s steps(4), infinite.
Imperative GSAP reveal fired in a ScrollTrigger onEnter callback. Not readable from the registry — captured live where possible.

animations.label: Hero headline + paragraph line-mask reveal on load
animations.notes: SplitText line reveal: 3 div.lines-split slide up from behind div.lines-split-mask (overflow-hidden). Hero H1 + paragraph. MAP initially missed this as a distinct animation; surfaced during capture. NOT captured: fires on load before the agent can arm (see _assessment.loadRace). Duration/ease inferred from the site signature token, not measured.

animations.label: Hero image vertical parallax on scroll
animations.notes: ScrollTrigger #1, scrub:true, start 'top bottom' end 'bottom top'. y in px. Read from tween vars.

animations.label: Work header counter-parallax on scroll
animations.notes: ScrollTrigger #2, scrub:true. Moves opposite the hero image. Read from tween vars.

animations.label: Section stacking parallax (prev section drifts as next enters)
animations.notes: ScrollTriggers #4 (services triggers work_home_wrap yPercent 20) and #5 (about triggers services_home_wrap yPercent 20). Same mechanism, two instances. Read from tween vars.

animations.label: Work card cover reveal on hover
animations.notes: GSAP-driven (not a CSS transition, so absent from the CSS sweep). Captured live with scan(); 6 layers move, 5-item stagger ~125ms. 20 frames, full timing read back. Reproducible across two captures.

animations.label: Work cover image crossfade on scroll-in
animations.notes: CORRECTED: MAP guessed 'spray-text/splittext' — wrong. Live capture shows an image opacity crossfade (two img.work_home_image swap, 1->0 and 0->1). Only 2 frames caught (fast); duration/ease unread. ScrollTrigger #7 onEnter.

animations.label: Partner logos staggered reveal on scroll
animations.notes: ScrollTrigger #0 onEnter (trigger partners_home_wrap), 6 logo targets. Capture WEAK: only y 0.18px caught over ~135ms — caught the tail, not the full reveal (see _assessment.fastFling). globalTimeline showed partners_logo_target tweens at 0.65s + one 0.25s; real reveal likely larger y/opacity. Recapture with slow approach to confirm.

animations.label: CTA collection reveal on scroll ('Let's paint something unforgettable')
animations.notes: ScrollTrigger #3 onEnter (trigger g_cta_collection). No split children — a collection-item reveal (like partners). NOT captured: a fast Lenis fling carried it from below-fold to mid-screen in one momentum burst, so the onEnter fired and finished before the engine sampled (see _assessment.fastFling). toggleActions 'play' (no replay on re-enter) so it can't be re-captured without reload.

animations.label: FAQ accordion open/close
animations.notes: Click toggles the panel; verified visually it opens (icon + -> -, 'CLOSE'). PRIMARY motion is a height/layout expansion of the answer panel, which the engine does NOT sample (it tracks transform/opacity/filter/clip/bg/color only) — capture returned 0. CSS sweep found a secondary transform transition on span.accordion_css_item_contain 0.75s cubic-bezier(0.31,0.75,0.22,1) and icon rotate 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1). Recreate as height/grid-rows transition + that easing.

animations.label: Decorative sprite-sheet loops
animations.notes: animation-name spriteFrames, 0.5s steps(4) infinite. ~7 instances across hero/work/testimonial/contact/footer/transition. Read from computed CSS.

animations.label: Page-transition overlay text wiggle
animations.notes: animation-name wiggle 0.23s steps(2) infinite. Part of the page-transition preloader overlay; visible during route transitions only.

unspecced.note: ScrollTrigger #6: trigger null, start 'top -300' end 'max', onUpdate only. A scroll-progress driver (likely nav show/hide or progress bar), not a discrete reveal.
Lightbox controls (div.vimeo-lightbox__btn opacity 0.3s; button.vimeo-lightbox__close all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.625,0.05,0,1)). Third-party lightbox polish, not site-signature.
'VIEW ALL WORK' / 'LEARN ABOUT OUR SERVICES' rows have animated arrow clusters (-> -> ->). Likely hover/marquee; not individually captured this pass.

_assessment.loadRace: Load-triggered reveals (hero-headline-reveal) finish before the agent can arm post-navigation. Fix options: throttle network to slow load, an init-script that auto-arms the engine before page JS, or re-trigger the GSAP timeline (tried for hero — tweens were auto-removed, failed).
_assessment.fastFling: onEnter scroll reveals (partners, cta) capture weakly or as 0 when reached via a large Lenis momentum fling: the site fires onEnter at 0% visibility and the reveal completes before the engine's first throttled scan. Fix: approach the target with SMALL final scroll increments (work-cover-crossfade captured cleanly this way). toggleActions 'play' means no replay on re-enter, so a miss requires reload to retry.
_assessment.engineGap: The engine samples transform/opacity/filter/clipPath/backgroundPosition/color only — NOT height/width/grid-template. Height-based accordions/expanders (faq-accordion) read as 0 moved. Consider adding height sampling, or rely on the CSS sweep for these.
_assessment.mapMiss: MAP via ScrollTrigger.getAll() + gsap.globalTimeline + CSS covered 7/11 animations precisely. It MISSED hero-headline-reveal (counted split elements but didn't classify them as a load animation) and MIS-LABELED work-cover (guessed splittext; it's an image crossfade). Capture corrected both. Lesson: MAP mechanism guesses for onEnter callbacks are unreliable; treat them as 'needs capture', and add a load-reveal classifier for SplitText/mask structures.
